description_long: This awning features a rectangular canopy with alternating blue and white vertical stripes, evoking a classic and inviting look often seen in urban commercial districts. The canopy is supported by two side panels that extend downward, providing additional shade and structural stability. The fabric appears to be tightly stretched over a rigid frame, likely made of lightweight metal such as aluminum. The edges of the canopy are straight and clean, with no decorative trim or scalloping. The underside of the awning is visible from certain angles, showing the same striped pattern as the top. There is no visible branding, signage, or additional decorative elements present on the awning.
description: A rectangular blue and white vertically striped awning with straight edges and side panels, supported by a rigid frame. The design is clean and classic, with no visible branding or decorative trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped canopy and both side panels, emphasizing the straight edge and clean lines.
description_view_1: Angled view from below, highlighting the underside of the canopy and the depth created by the side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view of the awning, displaying the striped pattern and the straight back edge.
description_view_3: Angled view from below and behind, showing the underside and the symmetry of the side panels.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to a storefront facade or above a window
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
